SeoraTech Electronics Co., Ltd. (KR) — DPA Schedule 3: Data Export Approval & Retention Workflow for Employment and IR
Scope covers employee onboarding records, resident-registration-number (RRN) fields (masked), IR inquiry logs, and deal files in the KRX pre-listing phase.
Legal basis: PIPA Art.15(1) consent and Art.17(3) separate consent for overseas transfer; processing necessary for employment and FSC/FSS regulatory filings.
Cross-border transfer: limited HR and IR metadata to Cloudhost Pte. Ltd. (Singapore) and Kazen Cloud KK (Japan); data at rest encrypted; storage region: SG/JPN; DPO approval required.
Minimisation: we do not collect full RRN; onboarding forms accept only hashed tokens and the last 1 digit is never stored; fields marked “optional” are not mandatory for access.
Retention: onboarding files retained 3 years post-termination; IR logs retained 5 years for audit; MNPI under FSCMA retained until public disclosure + 1 year, then archived or deleted.
DSAR: submit to privacy@seoratech.co.kr or portal https://privacy.seoratech.co.kr; identity verification via one-time code; response includes access/correction/erasure within statutory timelines.
Consent withdrawal: send request to dpo@seoratech.co.kr; upon withdrawal we stop cross-border transfers for that data subject and halt non-essential communications; necessary employment records may be kept as required by law.
Erasure: RRN tokens and CV attachments are purged from non-statutory systems within 30 days of valid DSAR or consent withdrawal, subject to legal holds.
Completed control: backup set HR-Q3-2024 was securely wiped on 2024-12-31 (certificate on file); verified by Ms. Ji-eun Park, Compliance Officer.
MNPI handling: information material under FSCMA (e.g., undisclosed forecasts, draft prospectus) is segregated; off-shore processors receive redacted datasets only; we do not transmit draft earnings to vendors.
Investor-relations gating: during quiet periods and blackout windows, IR inquiries are logged but content is filtered to exclude MNPI before any export.
Approval record: Data Export Approval SEA-2025-04 signed by Mr. Hyeon-woo Kim (DPO) and logged in the FSS query register on 2025-04-10.
Negative statement: this memo does not authorize any live transfer until all consents are recorded and vendor DPIAs are closed; no export is currently active.
Contact: SeoraTech DPO Office, e-mail dpo@seoratech.co.kr; escalation to Compliance Hotline +82-00-0000-0000 is available for data subjects and investors.
